name: Spain
description: Spain offers an excellent quality of life, rich culture, and affordable living costs. Its universities provide strong programs in business, architecture, and tourism within an EU framework.

tuitionFees.undergraduate: The Visa fees of INR 8185 must be paid via cash or online. We recommend DEMAND DRAFT.
tuitionFees.postgraduate: Financials – EUR 13,000 (1 year living) + Balance tuition fees
tuitionFees.phd: Often subsidized; FPU fellowships cover tuition + stipend

requirements: Long-stay student visa (Type D) application at Spanish consulate

languageRequirements.notes: Spanish B1–B2 for Spanish programs; English programs at private universities

faqs.question: Is it easy to get a student visa for Spain?
faqs.answer: With proper documentation and financial proof, obtaining a student visa for Spain is straightforward. MVR Consultants can guide you through the entire process.

faqs.question: What are the tuition fees in Spain?
faqs.answer: Tuition fees vary by university and program. Contact our counselors for program-specific fee structures.

faqs.question: Can I work while studying?
faqs.answer: Most countries allow international students to work part-time during term time. Specific hours and conditions depend on the country's immigration rules.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships available for Indian students?
faqs.answer: Yes, many universities and governments offer merit-based and need-based scholarships for international students. Ask our counselors for scholarship matching.
